dataProvenance.optimalTemp: FWC 2020 Stock Assessment + FishBase preferred range: https://myfwc.com/media/26711/snook-assessment-2020.pdf
dataProvenance.toleratedTemp: Howells et al. — cold-stun lower lethal limits 9-14°C: https://aquila.usm.edu/goms/vol6/iss2/12/
dataProvenance.tidePreference: Lowerre-Barbieri et al. 2014 PLOS ONE — outgoing-tide spawning egress: https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0101809
dataProvenance.lunarSensitivity: Lowerre-Barbieri et al. 2014 — new + full moon spawning aggregation peaks: https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0101809
dataProvenance.weatherSensitivity: frontalPassageFactor from FWC 2010 cold-front mass mortality (https://myfwc.com/research/saltwater/snook/cold-stun/); risingPressureFactor + fallingPressureFactor + cloudCoverPreference unverified
dataProvenance.timeOfDayPreferences: Blewett et al. (Charlotte Harbor) + acoustic telemetry — crepuscular + nocturnal: https://aquila.usm.edu/gcr/vol18/iss1/1/
dataProvenance.structurePreferences: Lowerre-Barbieri 2014 + FishBase habitat (mangrove → weedLine, dock pilings → wreck, pass → ripCurrent, channel-mouth → channelEdge): https://www.fishbase.se/summary/centropomus-undecimalis.html
dataProvenance.weeklyPresenceCurve: Lowerre-Barbieri 2014 spawning peak May-Sep + FWC 2020 stock assessment: https://myfwc.com/media/26711/snook-assessment-2020.pdf
dataProvenance.baitAssociations: Blewett et al. 2006 (Charlotte Harbor stomach analysis, fishes 71% by number / 90% by weight): https://aquila.usm.edu/gcr/vol18/iss1/1/
